data.title: Bitcoin ETFs attract $462M with BlackRock's IBIT leading with $307M as US spot Bitcoin ETFs see gains, totaling $1.1B inflow streak.
data.description: On Wednesday, BlackRock's IBIT saw the highest inflows of $307 million, contributing to a three-day streak of inflows totaling $1.1 billion for almost all US spot Bitcoin ETFs, which recorded gains.

data.title: Funding Circle exceeds 2026 revenue target, reporting impressive full-year 2025 results. #finance #growth
data.description: A recent report indicates that the country's economy is experiencing a dip, with a decrease of 2.5% in GDP growth compared to last year. The unemployment rate has risen by 1.2% to reach 7.8%, resulting in 2.5 million job losses. Inflation is also on the rise, with an increase of 3.5% in the past quarter. Additionally, the country's trade deficit has widened by $500 million. These economic challenges are raising concerns among policymakers and analysts about the country's financial stability and future growth prospects.

data.title: Henan intensifies efforts for higher-level opening-up
data.description: In an effort to transform into a more advanced inland opening-up hub, Henan province located in China is intensifying its trade and logistics connections with both domestic and global markets. The province aims to enhance its economic standing by fostering stronger trade relationships.Officials in Henan province have expressed their commitment to expanding and improving their trade and logistics networks to solidify their position in the global market. They are striving to upgrade the province's status by increasing their engagement with both national and international markets. This move is seen as a strategic effort to boost economic growth and increase trade volumes. Henan province is focusing on enhancing its trade capabilities to facilitate a higher level of trade flow with significant markets worldwide. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to elevate the province's economic influence in the region, with particular attention to strengthening both inbound and outbound trade. The province is dedicated to fostering a more robust trading environment by refining its logistical infrastructure and streamlining trade processes. The ultimate goal is to establish Henan province as a prominent player in the global trade arena, with an emphasis on expanding its trade volume both within China and beyond. By ramping up efforts to elevate its status as an inland opening-up hub, Henan province is poised to enhance its economic vitality and competitiveness on a broader scale.

data.title: CCTV+: China's national legislature starts annual session
data.description: On March 5, 2026, the fourth session of the 14th National People's Congress (NPC) of China commenced at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. President Xi Jinping, who serves as both the Chinese President and the general secretary of the Communist Party of China, was present at the opening ceremony. This important event brings together numerous delegates from across the nation to discuss and decide on crucial matters affecting the country's direction.

data.description: The Board of Directors of Sanofi recommended the appointment of Christel Heydemann as an independent director.

data.title: Boliden publishes Annual and Sustainability Report 2025
data.description: The Annual and Sustainability Report for 2025 from Boliden is now accessible on their website, providing insights into the company's operations and performance. The report focuses on key areas including strategy, sustainability, and financial results. Interested individuals can find the detailed information at www.boliden.com.

data.title: Nxera Pharma to Receive US$3 Million Milestone Payment from Centessa Pharmaceuticals
data.description: Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. revealed today that Centessa Pharmaceuticals has hit an early development milestone for ORX489, an orally administered OX2R agonist designed for neuropsychiatric disorder treatment. As a result, Nxera will receive a $3 million payment from Centessa as part of their research collaboration. This payment will be recorded as revenue in Q1 2026. Nxera is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 4565.

data.title: On International Women’s Day, New Coursera Report Reveals Global Progress Towards Narrowing GenAI Gender Gap
data.description: In Mountain View, California, a recent report by Coursera showcased advancements worldwide in reducing the gender gap in GenAI on International Women's Day. The report highlights significant progress in this area.

data.title: Sectra acquires Oxipit, advancing autonomous AI capabilities in diagnostic imaging
data.description: In a recent announcement dated March 5, 2026, in Linköping, Sweden, Sectra, a global company focusing on medical imaging IT and cybersecurity (STO: SECT B), revealed its plan to acquire Oxipit, UAB. This Lithuania-based company is renowned for its expertise in AI-driven radiology solutions. Of significance, Oxipit has acquired the first CE Class IIB certification in the industry. This strategic move solidifies Sectra's position in the sector while expanding its technological capabilities.
